_comment: Approved 5-star review from verified buyer — use as happy path display test
title: Exceeded my expectations
body: I've been using these headphones for two weeks now. Sound quality is crystal clear, battery lasts all day, and the noise cancellation is impressive for this price range. Highly recommend.

_comment: Approved 3-star review from non-verified buyer — tests mixed rating + no badge
title: Decent but not great
body: Sound quality is fine for casual listening. Build quality feels a bit cheap though. The ear cups get warm after an hour. Okay for the price.

body: Good headphones overall. Comfortable fit and pairs quickly with my phone. Only minor complaint is the carrying case feels flimsy.

title: Disappointing battery life
body: Battery only lasts about 4 hours for me, not the 20 hours advertised. Sound is okay but nothing special. Returning these.
